discover_mcp_tools: discover available tools across all connected MCP servers with optional keyword search and server filtering
call_mcp_tool: call a specific tool on a connected MCP server using qualified name format server.tool
chain_mcp_tool_calls: execute a sequential chain of MCP tool calls where each call builds on previous results
fan_out_mcp_calls: execute multiple MCP tool calls concurrently for parallel data gathering across independent sources
rank_mcp_tools: rank available MCP tools by relevance to a task description using BM25 and reliability scores
